name: nanoodle
description: Run your saved nanoodle workflow graphs as MCP tools — BYOK or accountless x402, spends from your NanoGPT balance or Nano wallet

graphs_dir.title: Noodles folder
graphs_dir.description: Directory of noodle-graph.json saves from the nanoodle.com editor — each file becomes one tool

nanogpt_api_key.title: NanoGPT API key
nanogpt_api_key.description: Your nano-gpt.com API key. Every tool call runs a workflow and spends from this key's balance.

out_dir.title: Output folder
out_dir.description: Where generated media (images, audio, video) is saved
